text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask Super Creek to write her name on a
document that needs to be signed...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry, but could you turn the other way for a
bit?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: It's just that, um... my skin's flaring up right now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I've been asked to do a lot of washing and
cleaning lately...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And I guess I've been too busy for proper skin
care.
choice_data_list: Are you okay? Does it hurt?
Are you okay? Does it hurt?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I-I asked you not to look! Bad Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to check but get scolded instead. She pushes
my face away, so I stare out the window for a
while...
